title: dortmanna patula
intro: Dortmanna patula, also known as the Lesser Dodder or Yellow Dodder, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Convolvulaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Dortmanna patula include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and soothe digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
